privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a '100% Stacked Bar Chart' named 'Segment_Mix_Analysis' with the title 'Customer Mix by Region'. The chart must map 'Region' to the X-Axis, 'Customer Segment' to Color (Legend), and 'Number of Orders' to the Y-Axis. A critical verified finding is that the provided local 'sample_order_lines2023.xlsx' dataset does not contain a 'Region' column. Agents must use the built-in 'Sample Order Lines' dataset provided by Oracle Analytics Desktop to successfully complete the task, or they will fail to find the required X-Axis dimension.
